title: Metabolomics and Lipidomics Sample Preparation
author: Kevin Contrepois
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bf4tjqwn

steps.title: Roughly 30 mg of frozen tissues...
steps.instruction: Roughly 30 mg of frozen tissues were homogenized in 500 µl ice-cold methanol by bead beating (MP bioscience cat# 6913-100, Solon, OH) at 4°C (2 x 45 s).

steps.title: 1 ml of MTBE was added...
steps.instruction: 1 ml of MTBE was added to 300 μl of the homogenate spiked-in with 40 µL deuterated lipid internal standards (Sciex, cat#: 5040156, lot#: LPISTDKIT-101).

steps.title: The samples were then sonicated (3...
steps.instruction: The samples were then sonicated (3 x 30 s) and agitated at 4°C for 30 min.

steps.title: After addition of 250 μl of...
steps.instruction: After addition of 250 μl of ice-cold water, the samples were vortexed for 1 min and centrifuged at 14,000 g for 5 min at 20°C.

steps.title: The upper organic phase contains the...
steps.instruction: The upper organic phase contains the lipids, the lower aqueous phase contains the metabolites and the proteins are precipitated at the bottom of the tube. For quality controls, 3 reference plasma samples (40 µL plasma) and 1 preparation blank were prepared in parallel.

steps.title: Proteins were further precipitated by adding...
steps.instruction: Proteins were further precipitated by adding 700 μl of 33/33/33 acetone/acetonitrile/methanol spiked-in with 15 labeled metabolite internal standards to 300 μl of the aqueous phase and 200 μl of the lipid phase and incubating the samples overnight at -20°C

steps.title: After centrifugation at 17,000 g for...
steps.instruction: After centrifugation at 17,000 g for 10 min at 4°C, the metabolic extracts were dried down to completion under a stream of nitrogen and resuspended in 100 μl 50/50 methanol/water.

steps.title: 700 µl of the organic upper...
steps.instruction: 700 µl of the organic upper phase was dried down and resolubilized in 200 μl of methanol for storage at -20°C until analysis.

steps.title: The day of the analysis, samples...
steps.instruction: The day of the analysis, samples were dried down, resuspended in 300 μl of 10 mM ammonium acetate in 90/10 methanol/toluene and centrifuged at 16,000 g for 5 min at 24°C.
